Operational rule: Generally at least 80% country coverage, comparable definition and unit, machine-readable, and the required female/sex dimension
Interpretation: Usable in the primary analytic frame for its stated purpose

Operational rule: Lower coverage or an important limitation in subgroup, time, uncertainty, comparability or standardisation
Interpretation: Usable only for restricted description, context or sensitivity analysis

Classification: Source located but not sufficiently harmonised/integrated
Operational rule: A relevant global or multi-country source was verified but could not be integrated into the prespecified frame
Interpretation: Do not describe the component as absent; identify the integration limitation

Operational rule: No source meeting the country-level compatibility requirements was identified in the predefined search
Interpretation: A source-frame result, not proof that no local data exist

Operational rule: The audit dimension is not conceptually applicable to the component
Interpretation: Excluded from adequacy interpretation for that cell
